es: con las manos en la masa
de la noche a la mañana

en: to wake up (someone or something else)

es: en el mejor de los casos
en el peor de los casos
en la medida de lo posible
en un abrir y cerrar de ojos
en: in the blink of an eye

es: por lo que se refiere a

en: by the skin of one's teeth

notes: demonstrative adj/pron (fem sg): esta mesa = this table
demonstrative adj/pron (masc pl): estos libros = these books
demonstrative adj/pron (fem pl): estas mesas = these tables
neuter demonstrative pron: esto es difícil = this is difficult
demonstrative adj/pron (masc sg): ese chico = that boy
demonstrative adj/pron (fem sg): esa chica = that girl
demonstrative adj/pron (masc pl): esos libros = those books
demonstrative adj/pron (fem pl): esas mesas = those tables
neuter demonstrative pron: eso es verdad = that is true
distal demonstrative adj/pron (masc sg): aquel hombre = that man (over there)
distal demonstrative adj/pron (fem sg): aquella mujer = that woman (over there)
distal demonstrative adj/pron (masc pl): aquellos árboles = those trees (over there)
distal demonstrative adj/pron (fem pl): aquellas flores = those flowers (over there)
neuter distal demonstrative pron: aquello fue difícil = that was difficult

en: to arrange a piece of music
to be nominated for an award
to exchange for a different size
to grow up in a family
to look someone up and down
to go on a road trip

es: a medida que pasa el tiempo
desde el punto de vista de
en: from the point of view of
when all is said and done

es: en lo que a mí respecta

en: at the end of the day
can you call me a taxi?
can you give me a discount?
can you tell me where ... is?
do I need to change trains?
how long have you been here?
I need to go to A&E
I need to go to the police
I need to see a doctor

es: a la luz de los hechos
era mejor de lo que pensaba
en: it was better than I thought

es: era peor de lo que temía
en: it was worse than I feared
what is the dish of the day?
what time does the train leave?
would you like to leave a message?
